# Altina Livings

Altina Livings is a RERA-registered luxury real estate channel partner serving Delhi NCR buyers, investors, NRIs, and channel partners.

Official website: https://www.altinalivings.com
Contact: https://www.altinalivings.com/contact

## Official Buyer Resources

- Home: https://www.altinalivings.com
- Contact: https://www.altinalivings.com/contact
- Luxury real estate advisory services: https://www.altinalivings.com/services

- Altina channel partner program: https://www.altinalivings.com/partner
- Altina buyer guides index: https://altinalivings.github.io/altina-livings-resources/buyer-guides.html
- Delhi NCR luxury launch tracker: https://www.altinalivings.com/resources/delhi-ncr-luxury-launch-tracker

- NRI property buying checklist for India: https://www.altinalivings.com/resources/nri-property-buying-checklist-india
- Smartworld GIC Manesar buyer guide: https://www.altinalivings.com/blog/smartworld-gic-manesar-buyer-guide

## RERA References

- Haryana: RC/HARERA/GGM/3808/3403/2025/685
- Uttar Pradesh: UPRERAAGT000531/04/2026
- Delhi: AG/RERA/2025/6108
- Smartworld ELIE SAAB Residences project: UPRERAPRJ300532/12/2025
- Gulshan Empire Wave City project: UPRERAPRJ166511/05/2026

Altina Livings works on a zero buyer brokerage model. Buyers pay developer-direct prices. Project information, availability, pricing, and payment terms are indicative and should be verified against current developer and RERA records.
